data.title: The Volleyball Reset Flywheel
data.description: High-intensity physical exertion through morning beach volleyball acts as a neurological circuit breaker, consistently clearing the 'cognitive wall' and enabling flawless focus for complex full-stack development tasks in the following 24-48 hours.

data.title: The Late-Night Configuration Trap
data.description: Working on system configuration files or database architecture past 3:00 AM creates a recurring 'architectural friction' that manifests as severe conceptual exhaustion and an inability to visualize basic algorithmic logic for up to 48 hours after the late-night session.

data.title: Perfectionism as Procrastination
data.description: When faced with difficult backend integration or debugging, you subconsciously pivot to 'secondary perfectionism'—obsessing over presentation aesthetics, jargon-stuffed documentation, or layout tweaks—as a coping mechanism to avoid the anxiety of the primary technical challenge.
